scenario: Synthetic SOC dataset with realistic vendor products, single-product tags, and interleaved campaign/noise events.
derived_from: round2 redesign for realistic SOC telemetry
timeline: All 100 alerts are distributed across Jan-Apr 2024 with noise, finance-ransomware activity, and HR insider-exfil activity intentionally mixed in time.
source_convention: source uses real product names, such as Cortex XDR, Google Workspace Security, Netskope, and CrowdStrike Falcon.
tag_convention: tags contains exactly one value: the same product name used in source.
source_ref_policy: Existing round2 sourceRef values were preserved so historical references remain stable.
